markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the CheckThat launch plan and address flat organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Launch Strategy:** A soft launch to the community will precede the public launch. This will gather early feedback and allow for manual, high-touch onboarding (e.g., pre-creating workspaces) for key logos.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Positioning:** The core message will shift from "AI Answer Index" to "Buyer Intent Graph for AI Visibility." This reframes CheckThat as a unique market intelligence tool, not a generic competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Organic Growth:** Clicks are flat (\~150/week), far below the 2k/month goal. The primary hypothesis is low content quality, as manually rewriting 10 pricing pages immediately recovered lost traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [**Team Bottleneck:** The CheckThat team is under-resourced (Talal's time is zeroed out, Kerry is rolling off), limiting the pace of experimentation and the ability to implement known fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3518.0)

## Topics

### Organic Growth Plateau

  - [Organic clicks are flat at \~150/week, far below the 2,000/month goal.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [**Impact:** This pace projects only \~4 paying customers/year, making the current strategy unsustainable.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=2975.0)
  - [**Primary Hypothesis:** Low content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3706.0)
      - [**Evidence:** Manually rewriting 10 pricing pages immediately recovered traffic after it had dropped.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3706.0)
      - [**Action:** This validates the need to improve the programmatic content generation workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3706.0)
  - [**Secondary Hypothesis:** Poor site structure and interlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3166.0)
      - [**Evidence:** Only \~30 of 300+ published pricing pages are indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3900.0)
      - [**Action:** Improve internal linking and ensure all pages are discoverable.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3166.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Redesign "Alternatives" pages as dynamic, filterable tables (like G2) instead of static articles.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=2171.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a better user experience and can be updated programmatically.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
      - [**Counterpoint:** Static articles with editorial content often rank better for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=2367.0)

### CheckThat Launch Strategy

  - [**Phase 1: Soft Launch (Community)**](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**Goal:** Gather early feedback and validate the product before a public announcement.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**Method:** Offer early access to community members via email.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
      - [**High-Touch Onboarding:** Manually pre-create workspaces for key logos to ensure a "bullseye" first experience.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
          - [**Process:** Add brands, categories, prompts, and competitors.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
          - [**Incentive:** Offer a free 30-min strategy session with Marcel or Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Public Launch**](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Plan:** A main launch post, supported by sponsored newsletter placements.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
      - [**Video:** Record a launch video with Marcel and Jason on Wednesday at 12:30 PM.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Marcel's schedule is clear, and the recording can be used for the Thursday breakfast presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

### Product Positioning & Category Gaps

  - [**New Positioning:** "Buyer Intent Graph for AI Visibility."](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This reframes CheckThat as a unique market intelligence tool, not a generic competitor.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Category Gaps:** The current 172 categories are too broad, causing a poor initial user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
      - [**Example:** A company like Nav.com (business credit) doesn't fit into any existing category.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add more nuanced subcategories. Marcel has a list of \~200.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Confirm Will's availability for the video recording on Wednesday at 12:30 PM.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Jason:** Share the list of high-potential community members for soft-launch onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Jason:** Document the CheckThat team's resource bottleneck and its impact on growth.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3518.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Refine the "Buyer Intent Graph" positioning for the launch video.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Begin adding more nuanced subcategories to the CheckThat platform.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Develop a plan for testing the new "Alternatives" page format.](https://fathom.video/share/EpnsCs6DwbUD87Q1Ja-xUVyVNMqZ1Pb7?tab=summary&timestamp=3783.0)
